plugin.name: maddi Maven plugin
plugin.description: Run the maddi analyzer (modification analysis for duplication detection and immutability) from Maven.

mojo.description: Parse the project's sources and run the prep- and modification-analysis, writing an analysis-result JSON per package (default <build>/e2immu). Uses the openjdk (javac) front-end, so the Maven JVM needs the javac --add-exports (via .mvn/jvm.config or MAVEN_OPTS).

parameter.name: project
parameter.description: The current Maven project.

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The current Maven session.

parameter.name: jre
parameter.description: Alternative JRE/JDK home to resolve the JDK modules against; empty = the running JVM's.

parameter.name: workingDirectory
parameter.description: Directory the analyzer resolves relative source/classpath paths against.

parameter.name: excludeFromClasspath
parameter.description: Comma/semicolon-separated jar names to drop from the resolved classpath.

parameter.name: jmods
parameter.description: Colon/comma-separated JDK modules to add to the classpath closure.

parameter.name: testSourcePackages
parameter.description: Restrict parsed test sources to these packages (comma-separated; trailing dot = subpackages).

parameter.name: sourcePackages
parameter.description: Restrict parsed main sources to these packages (comma-separated; trailing dot = subpackages).

parameter.name: sourceEncoding
parameter.description: Source file encoding.

parameter.name: analysisResultsDir
parameter.description: Where to write analysis-result JSON; empty = <build>/e2immu.

parameter.name: analysisSteps
parameter.description: Comma-separated analysis steps (none|prep|analysis-order|modification); empty = default.

parameter.name: incrementalAnalysis
parameter.description: Enable the analyzer's incremental mode.

parameter.name: parallel
parameter.description: Parallelize the analysis.

parameter.name: quiet
parameter.description: Suppress the warning/error summary on stdout.

parameter.name: warnNearMisses
parameter.description: Emit advisory warnings for near-misses (e.g. would be @Container but for one modifying parameter).

parameter.name: debug
parameter.description: Comma-separated debug targets.

parameter.name: preloadAnalysisResultsDirs
parameter.description: Directories of precomputed analysis hints to preload.

parameter.name: analysisResultsTargetDir
parameter.description: Where to write analyzed AnalysisHints files.

parameter.name: updatedHintsDir
parameter.description: Where to write AnalysisHints skeleton files extracted from sources.

parameter.name: updatedHintsPackage
parameter.description: Package to write the AnalysisHints skeletons to.

parameter.name: hintsPackages
parameter.description: Source packages to create analysis-hint skeletons from.

mojo.description: Resolve the project's source sets and classpath and write the derived InputConfiguration as JSON (default <build>/inputConfiguration.json), without running the analysis. Uses the in-house parser (no --add-exports needed).

parameter.name: project
parameter.description: The current Maven project.

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The current Maven session.

parameter.name: jre
parameter.description: Alternative JRE/JDK home to resolve the JDK modules against; empty = the running JVM's.

parameter.name: workingDirectory
parameter.description: Directory the analyzer resolves relative source/classpath paths against.

parameter.name: excludeFromClasspath
parameter.description: Comma/semicolon-separated jar names to drop from the resolved classpath.

parameter.name: jmods
parameter.description: Colon/comma-separated JDK modules to add to the classpath closure.

parameter.name: testSourcePackages
parameter.description: Restrict parsed test sources to these packages.

parameter.name: sourcePackages
parameter.description: Restrict parsed main sources to these packages.

parameter.name: sourceEncoding
parameter.description: Source file encoding.

parameter.name: analysisResultsDir
parameter.description: Where to write analysis-result JSON; empty = <build>/e2immu.

parameter.name: analysisSteps
parameter.description: Comma-separated analysis steps; empty = default.

parameter.name: incrementalAnalysis
parameter.description: Enable the analyzer's incremental mode.

parameter.name: parallel
parameter.description: Parallelize the analysis.

parameter.name: quiet
parameter.description: Suppress the warning/error summary on stdout.

parameter.name: warnNearMisses
parameter.description: Emit advisory warnings for near-misses (e.g. would be @Container but for one modifying parameter).

parameter.name: debug
parameter.description: Comma-separated debug targets.

parameter.name: preloadAnalysisResultsDirs
parameter.description: Directories of precomputed analysis hints to preload.

parameter.name: analysisResultsTargetDir
parameter.description: Where to write analyzed AnalysisHints files.

parameter.name: updatedHintsDir
parameter.description: Where to write AnalysisHints skeleton files extracted from sources.

parameter.name: updatedHintsPackage
parameter.description: Package to write the AnalysisHints skeletons to.

parameter.name: hintsPackages
parameter.description: Source packages to create analysis-hint skeletons from.

parameter.name: outputFile
parameter.description: File to write the derived InputConfiguration JSON to.

mojo.description: Parse the sources and write method-call-frequency histograms (overall, main-only, test-only, and per source set). Uses the in-house parser (no --add-exports needed).

parameter.name: project
parameter.description: The current Maven project.

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The current Maven session.

parameter.name: jre
parameter.description: Alternative JRE/JDK home to resolve the JDK modules against; empty = the running JVM's.

parameter.name: workingDirectory
parameter.description: Directory the analyzer resolves relative source/classpath paths against.

parameter.name: excludeFromClasspath
parameter.description: Comma/semicolon-separated jar names to drop from the resolved classpath.

parameter.name: jmods
parameter.description: Colon/comma-separated JDK modules to add to the classpath closure.

parameter.name: testSourcePackages
parameter.description: Restrict parsed test sources to these packages.

parameter.name: sourcePackages
parameter.description: Restrict parsed main sources to these packages.

parameter.name: sourceEncoding
parameter.description: Source file encoding.

parameter.name: analysisResultsDir
parameter.description: Where to write analysis-result JSON; empty = <build>/e2immu.

parameter.name: analysisSteps
parameter.description: Comma-separated analysis steps; empty = default.

parameter.name: incrementalAnalysis
parameter.description: Enable the analyzer's incremental mode.

parameter.name: parallel
parameter.description: Parallelize the analysis.

parameter.name: quiet
parameter.description: Suppress the warning/error summary on stdout.

parameter.name: warnNearMisses
parameter.description: Emit advisory warnings for near-misses (e.g. would be @Container but for one modifying parameter).

parameter.name: debug
parameter.description: Comma-separated debug targets.

parameter.name: preloadAnalysisResultsDirs
parameter.description: Directories of precomputed analysis hints to preload.

parameter.name: analysisResultsTargetDir
parameter.description: Where to write analyzed AnalysisHints files.

parameter.name: updatedHintsDir
parameter.description: Where to write AnalysisHints skeleton files extracted from sources.

parameter.name: updatedHintsPackage
parameter.description: Package to write the AnalysisHints skeletons to.

parameter.name: hintsPackages
parameter.description: Source packages to create analysis-hint skeletons from.

parameter.name: methodCallFrequencies
parameter.description: Output: overall method-call frequency histogram.

parameter.name: methodCallFrequenciesMain
parameter.description: Output: main-sources method-call frequency histogram.

parameter.name: methodCallFrequenciesTest
parameter.description: Output: test-sources method-call frequency histogram.

parameter.name: methodCallFrequenciesBySourceSet
parameter.description: Output: overall frequency histogram grouped by source set.

parameter.name: methodCallFrequenciesMainBySourceSet
parameter.description: Output: main-sources frequency histogram grouped by source set.

parameter.name: methodCallFrequenciesTestBySourceSet
parameter.description: Output: test-sources frequency histogram grouped by source set.

mojo.description: Generate first-cut analysis-hint (.java) skeletons for the library types the project's sources call into, annotated with call-frequency comments (default output <build>/annotatedAPI). Uses the in-house parser (no --add-exports needed).

parameter.name: project
parameter.description: The current Maven project.

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The current Maven session.

parameter.name: jre
parameter.description: Alternative JRE/JDK home to resolve the JDK modules against; empty = the running JVM's.

parameter.name: workingDirectory
parameter.description: Directory the analyzer resolves relative source/classpath paths against.

parameter.name: excludeFromClasspath
parameter.description: Comma/semicolon-separated jar names to drop from the resolved classpath.

parameter.name: jmods
parameter.description: Colon/comma-separated JDK modules to add to the classpath closure.

parameter.name: testSourcePackages
parameter.description: Restrict parsed test sources to these packages.

parameter.name: sourcePackages
parameter.description: Restrict parsed main sources to these packages.

parameter.name: sourceEncoding
parameter.description: Source file encoding.

parameter.name: analysisResultsDir
parameter.description: Where to write analysis-result JSON; empty = <build>/e2immu.

parameter.name: analysisSteps
parameter.description: Comma-separated analysis steps; empty = default.

parameter.name: incrementalAnalysis
parameter.description: Enable the analyzer's incremental mode.

parameter.name: parallel
parameter.description: Parallelize the analysis.

parameter.name: quiet
parameter.description: Suppress the warning/error summary on stdout.

parameter.name: warnNearMisses
parameter.description: Emit advisory warnings for near-misses (e.g. would be @Container but for one modifying parameter).

parameter.name: debug
parameter.description: Comma-separated debug targets.

parameter.name: preloadAnalysisResultsDirs
parameter.description: Directories of precomputed analysis hints to preload.

parameter.name: analysisResultsTargetDir
parameter.description: Where to write analyzed AnalysisHints files.

parameter.name: updatedHintsDir
parameter.description: Where to write AnalysisHints skeleton files extracted from sources.

parameter.name: updatedHintsPackage
parameter.description: Package to write the AnalysisHints skeletons to.

parameter.name: hintsPackages
parameter.description: Source packages to create analysis-hint skeletons from.

parameter.name: outputDirectory
parameter.description: Directory to write the generated hint (.java) skeletons to.

parameter.name: packagePrefix
parameter.description: Package prefix prepended to generated hint packages; not part of the output directory.

mojo.description: Compile hand-written analysis hints (.java, from inputDirectory, default <build>/annotatedAPI) into analysis-result (.json) files (default outputDirectory <build>/compiledAPI). Uses the openjdk (javac) front-end, so the Maven JVM needs the javac --add-exports.

parameter.name: project
parameter.description: The current Maven project.

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The current Maven session.

parameter.name: jre
parameter.description: Alternative JRE/JDK home to resolve the JDK modules against; empty = the running JVM's.

parameter.name: workingDirectory
parameter.description: Directory the analyzer resolves relative source/classpath paths against.

parameter.name: excludeFromClasspath
parameter.description: Comma/semicolon-separated jar names to drop from the resolved classpath.

parameter.name: jmods
parameter.description: Colon/comma-separated JDK modules to add to the classpath closure.

parameter.name: testSourcePackages
parameter.description: Restrict parsed test sources to these packages.

parameter.name: sourcePackages
parameter.description: Restrict parsed main sources to these packages.

parameter.name: sourceEncoding
parameter.description: Source file encoding.

parameter.name: analysisResultsDir
parameter.description: Where to write analysis-result JSON; empty = <build>/e2immu.

parameter.name: analysisSteps
parameter.description: Comma-separated analysis steps; empty = default.

parameter.name: incrementalAnalysis
parameter.description: Enable the analyzer's incremental mode.

parameter.name: parallel
parameter.description: Parallelize the analysis.

parameter.name: quiet
parameter.description: Suppress the warning/error summary on stdout.

parameter.name: warnNearMisses
parameter.description: Emit advisory warnings for near-misses (e.g. would be @Container but for one modifying parameter).

parameter.name: debug
parameter.description: Comma-separated debug targets.

parameter.name: preloadAnalysisResultsDirs
parameter.description: Directories of precomputed analysis hints to preload.

parameter.name: analysisResultsTargetDir
parameter.description: Where to write analyzed AnalysisHints files.

parameter.name: updatedHintsDir
parameter.description: Where to write AnalysisHints skeleton files extracted from sources.

parameter.name: updatedHintsPackage
parameter.description: Package to write the AnalysisHints skeletons to.

parameter.name: hintsPackages
parameter.description: Source packages to create analysis-hint skeletons from.

parameter.name: inputDirectory
parameter.description: Directory holding the hand-written analysis-hint (.java) sources to compile.

parameter.name: outputDirectory
parameter.description: Directory to write the compiled analysis-result (.json) files to.

parameter.name: restrictToPackages
parameter.description: Only process these packages (comma/semicolon-separated).
